findings: Stuck defined only by claimed-task age: any file in claimed/ older than 120s flagged as stuck
Timeout-based stuck detection: 120s for bell/visual warning, 180s ORPHAN_RECOVERY_AFTER for re-queue
File-modification heuristics use claimed file mtime, not result-file freshness
Heartbeat/PID-liveness checks limited and indirect; only commander orphan checks read heartbeat
Stuck detection emits audible bell and warning; no auto-remediation until orphan path
Edge cases: long tasks false-positive after 120s; substring-based ALERTED matching; race conditions in orphan recovery
